I’ve played a lot of vr shooters like this one - gun raiders, hyper dash, etc, and I can say with confidence that this game has the mechanics to become one of the best vr movement shooters on the market. Very smooth and natural movement, great weapon options with their own special mechanics to suit any playstyle - I can see this being a lot of fun, just needs more people. So download this game, write a review, let’s make this game huge!

reviews.review_description: If you are into fast paced first person shooters like unreal tournament and or quake . I highly recommend you check out grapple tournament. It's free . It's fast paced and it's actually a good game. I discovered it last night while searching thru steam for free VR apps. And wow I was not disappointed. Being born in the 80's and having an intense love relationship with fast paced shooters these kind of games have a special place in my heart. Albeit free the player count seems a little low which is the case for most vr shooters. I'm just asking you that you download it and give it a try . So I can blow your butt up later . Hahahaha . I've only played 3 matches but watch out for TheCreamster lol

There’s a lot of good things to say about this game, but let’s start with the obvious one… IT’S FREE! 

Having played a few “grappling” type games in vr before, this feature of the game felt very comfortable. One small detail I liked was that you stutter step while moving forward if you grapple straight across while on the ground. It’s just a small detail that while annoying at times, makes sense. Perfecting the grappling takes some time, but it’s a big gameplay advantage when you get the hang of it. 

After following a short, but very informative tutorial you’re ready to jump right in. Standard vr settings are also customizable right when you start up the game. 

There are a lot of customizable looks to give your character, and I was pleasantly surprised to see Dragon Ball Z character customization options. You also get to customize your primary weapon that you start each game with. Pick a weapon type that suits you best, along with a melee weapon and your trusty bow and arrow.

While there isn’t a single player story mode, there is a single player option to practice playing against “bots” or computer players as we used to call them. 

Multiplayer. This is what the game is all about. There are different game modes, and quite a few different maps. Stock up on shields and health when you start the match and start fighting other players. The weapons were surprisingly balanced. Heavier guns deal more damage but make you move slower. Quite the opposite for smaller guns, which generally allow you to move quickly but lack the fire power and damage output of the larger guns. Except for revolvers, those things are small but pack a punch. Dual wield weapons to give maximum damage to your opponents, but be cautious because you can’t use your grapple while dual wielding. 

This game is easy to pick up, hard to master, and provides countless hours of fun. The graphics are crisp and clean, pretty good for a quest 2 game. I’d say this is an essential game for every quest owner. Nice job 👍🏽
Very worth the price! Great gameplay feel and cute graphics. The hook mechanic adds so much
Hi I just want to say this game is great, but the gritty is to op, a whole lobby of 4 year olds just doing the gritty it’s just to much, but besides that the game is great ok see ya👋

I bought grapple tournament a while back But there was nobody on it and when one or two people would actually be there it was a rubberbanding nightmare￼. Today is the first time I played it since then because I noticed it was being added to the free section of the oculus Store. There was only one game going and that game had at least three hackers in it and a guy with a racist name unless he was talking about a raccoon￼  Let me tell you right off the bat this game is light years behind gun raiders ￼You can down the hackers in gun raiders￼ and maybe you might get a few people to play it but once they see what I saw today they're not gonna want to play It for long￼￼ . They are going hard with the aim bot.your bullet doesn't do anything when you shoot a hacker sometimes in your game more than 50% was aimed right at the dude nothing while they are flying around going super fast and hitting me one shot every time and because they're hacking it doesn't let me get my kill with a one shot If it was gun Raiders they would just not take critical damage so because they kept picking  a one shot gib room They just don't take any damage. Any regular player is going to hate it when your brand new and you got hackers in there that are known to be toxic one of them this kid lemon hack I think his father works for oculus and got gun Raiders to stop recording my stats for over a year I had to complain that my stats weren't going up when I realized Then they turned it on but only added like 50,000 To my kd ￼When the people who were playing from the same time that I started the beginning around the top of the leaderboard I was playing eight hours a day when I first got my oculus ￼Going beast mode almost every game￼. It's the same thing on Console right now. engine Owning￼￼ all over the place I personally think developers make the hacks as a side hustle. but you gotta let the regular man get a chance to win too that's the whole reason why they hack because they really suck but then they make the game suck. I'm in no rush but I record everything I do iN VR and put it on my YouTube channel So if you wanna see firsthand what I experienced my YouTube channel name is MrBrooklynite￼￼ Although I have much better Contant to upload first and I really hope you can at least make our shots count so that way I can enjoy your game. ￼
p.s. 
Please don't insult my intelligence by saying people can't hack on this headset I already seen TikTok videos of people opening up menus and other games and spawning behind people and that ain't in the game￼ Unless it's admin abuse and if that's the case it's no different you should hire professionals￼. Although I am not erasing your game yet I am not going to play it till I see a blue dot but there was an update and if it is crappy then as well there's probably no hope for you you're up against other games gun raiders is king you can hacks the hacks in there￼￼. I was downing them in your game too but one guy wasn't taking no damage I was hitting him with the sword even. ￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We take hacking very seriously and we will do everything in our capacity to prevent cheating. For example all the shots and actions are server validated so hackers would need to hack the servers for cheating. We checked our servers and haven't seen any traces of hacking so far. We will continue to monitor this.

With that said, this doesn't mean that the game can't have latency issues sometimes. The shooting prediction mechanics are still under constant improvements but still if a player's ping is too high that can cause a similar experience to what you mentioned.
Instagib game mode is currently one of the most popular ones that players choose in the voting area. That mode with high ping can also cause a situation similar to what you mentioned. For the time being, if you're experiencing high ping, please try this: exit the match and queue in for a new one that hopefully will be on a server closer to you.

You probably already know this, but worth mentioning for others reading this: the energy-based melee weapons have to be opened with the trigger button to cause damage.

Last but not least, you can mute individuals or opt out of voice chat: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DDp904D7k2c

developer_response.body: We're sorry for your experience. Games shouldn't be able to effect the headset itself so this seems to be an issue outside of the game. Can you please try to restart or reset your Oculus Quest? If that doesn't solve your issue, can you please reach out to us or the community for further help? The official Discord server is: https://discord.gg/A4fUKDC
